title: Java HashSet
learningGoals: Practice add and contains on Set.

completionChecks.prompt: What does a second seen.add("java") return?
choices: It removes the existing java entry
false, because the element is already present
completionChecks.explanation: Set.add returns false when the element is already present and leaves the set unchanged, because a HashSet stores each value at most once.

completionChecks.prompt: What does seen.contains("java") return after adding java?
choices: It throws because sets have no contains method
completionChecks.explanation: HashSet stores unique elements and contains reports whether a value is present, so it returns true after java was added.

completionChecks.prompt: What does this code print if seen.add("java") is called once more before the println?
choices: Compilation fails because HashSet rejects duplicate add calls
completionChecks.explanation: Adding a duplicate does not add a second copy, but the set still contains java, so contains("java") remains true.
